title: cephalaria rigida
intro: Cephalaria rigida, also known as the rigid cephalaria or wolf's bane, is a perennial flowering plant native to Eastern Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of cephalaria rigida include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. Cephalaria rigida can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
